news.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
news.detail: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.

news.title: SpaceX希望在IPO中获得1.8万亿美元估值
news.detail: 据美国知名财经媒体报道，埃隆·马斯克旗下的SpaceX公司正寻求在其首次公开募股（IPO）中获得至少1.8万亿美元的估值。 该媒体此前曾报道，该公司寻求的估值超过2万亿美元...

news.title: Dan Ives: Anthropic’s growth is 'just the tip of the spear' for AI rally
news.detail: Ives' comments come as part of a wider prediction for the Nasdaq to top 30,000 points by 2027, reiterating his call from earlier interviews with CNBC.

news.title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
news.detail: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.

news.title: 美联储理事米歇尔・鲍曼警示：不应因通胀反弹而加息
news.detail: 核心要点美联储理事米歇尔・鲍曼周五提醒，不应为应对当前物价反弹而采取加息举措。她表示，针对能源价格短期上涨引发的通胀上行贸然加息，会造成不必要的政策收紧...
